sections.paragraph:
and שְׂרָיָהוּ (“soldier of Jehovah”), [Seraiah], pr.n.-

(1) of the secretary of David, 2Sa 8:17, a name, the reading of which is corrupted [contracted] in other places into שְׁיָא, 2Sa 20:25 שִׁישָׁא 1Ki 4:2 שַׁוְשָׁא 1Ch 18:16.-(2) of the father of Ezra the priest, Ezr 7:1.-(3) of other men, see 2Ki 25:18, 23 2Ki 25:23 Jer 36:26 40:8 51:59 , 61 Jer 51:61 1Ch 4:13, 14 1Ch 4:14, 35 1Ch 4:35 5:40 Ezr 2:2 Neh 10:3 11:11 12:1 , 12 Neh 12:12.

[שִׂרְיֹן pr.n. Deu 3:9, see שִׁרְיֹן .]
